summary: Today's tech community is captivated by the Artemis II mission, with AI leaders like Mark Riedl sharing humorous and poignant real-time reactions to the historic lunar flyby and communications blackout. Amidst the space excitement, NeurIPS 2026 announced a key deadline shift, moving its unified submission site opening to April 15th. Meanwhile, The Linux Foundation highlighted the immense economic impact of open source, underscoring its foundational role in global industry.
